messages.content: Before we split commits, run pnpm -C frontend build and keep a handoff note if anything fails.
Understood. I'll run pnpm -C frontend build first and fall back to a concise handoff if the export pass still needs follow-up.

gold.reference:
## Background
- Title: Quick build gate check
- Platform: Qwen
- Context: The thread is a sparse pre-commit check focused on running pnpm -C frontend build before cutting commits.

## Key Questions
- Should we run pnpm -C frontend build before splitting commits?

## Decisions And Answers
- Run pnpm -C frontend build first and keep a handoff note if follow-up is still needed.

## Reusable Artifacts
- Command: pnpm -C frontend build
- Reference: handoff note

## Unresolved
- The export pass may still need follow-up after the build gate completes.
